mapper.select:
SELECT tab.id, tab.orderNo, tab.welfareCenterRewardType, tab.receiveStatus, tab.currencyCode, tab.amount, tab.detailType, tab.pfTime, tab.pfEndTime FROM (
SELECT id, order_no as orderNo FROM site_activity_order_record_v2 WHERE site_code = #{siteCode} AND show_flag = 1 AND user_account = #{userAccount} and receive_status = 0
UNION ALL SELECT id, order_id as orderNo FROM site_vip_award_record_v2 WHERE site_code = #{siteCode} AND user_account = #{userAccount} and receive_status = 0
